chinese_text:
維天之命，於穆不已。
於乎不顯，文王之德之純。
translation_text:
The ordinances of Heaven,—
How
deep are they and unintermitting!
And oh! how illustrious
Was the singleness of the virtue of king Wăn!

chinese_text:
假以溢我，我其收之。
駿惠我文王，曾孫篤之。
translation_text:
How does he (now) show his kindness?
We will receive it,
Striving to be in accord with him, our ​king Wăn;
And may his remotest descendant be abundantly the same!
